case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX VS. JUAN ARCIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOLINDA JACKSON SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT JUAN ARCIA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOLINDA JACKSON, SR. COLLECTION OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLEECTOR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TREASURER & TAX COLEECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARCIA, JUAN $2,424.00 PRINCIPAL, $97.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,521.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
